name: 24" x 30" Neutral Abstract Lines Framed Canvas - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description: Liven up any room with the Neutral Abstract Lines Framed Canvas from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This 24-inch x 30-inch framed piece features a subtle abstract work in neutral tones on canvas that will fit most decor styles neatly. Plus, the flat-edge beige frame easily blends into any interior color palette. Hang it up on an empty patch of wall to add character and softness to any space, or add it to a growing gallery wall.
